seoTitle: Burrum River vs Burton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Burrum River and Burton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Burrum River vs Burton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Burrum River and Burton.
heading: Burrum River vs Burton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Burrum River, Queensland and Burton, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Burrum River has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Burton (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Burrum River or Burton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Burrum River has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Burton scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Burrum River scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Burton scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Burrum River or Burton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Burrum River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
